creator: ports@nicandneal.net
text:
As of 2021-12-09 Anki fails to run with the following stack trace:

  File "/usr/local/bin/anki", line 7, in <module>
    import aqt
  File "/usr/local/share/anki/aqt/__init__.py", line 54, in <module>
    from aqt.main import AnkiQt  # isort:skip
  File "/usr/local/share/anki/aqt/main.py", line 48, in <module>
    from aqt.addons import DownloadLogEntry, check_and_prompt_for_updates, show_log_to_user
  File "/usr/local/share/anki/aqt/addons.py", line 18, in <module>
    import jsonschema
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/jsonschema/__init__.py", line 12, in <module>
    from jsonschema._format import (
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/jsonschema/_format.py", line 7, in <module>
    from jsonschema.exceptions import FormatError
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/jsonschema/exceptions.py", line 11, in <module>
    from jsonschema import _utils
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.8/site-packages/jsonschema/_utils.py", line 12, in <module>
    import importlib_resources as resources
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'importlib_resources'

Installing py38-importlib-resources seems to fix the problem.
